App.Title: Wayfinder
App.Subtitle: Guided PF2E creation and level-up
App.NoPending: No pending Wayfinder steps were detected for this actor.
App.Guidance: Wayfinder automates compendium-backed item choices and actor level changes. Ability boosts and skill increases remain guided checkpoints in this first cut.

ExtraPacks.Name: Extra PF2E compendium allowlist
ExtraPacks.Hint: Comma-separated compendium ids to search in addition to the official PF2E packs, for example world.homebrew-feats,my-module.custom-options.

Notifications.OwnerOnly: You must own this character to use Wayfinder.
Notifications.MissingSelections: Complete all required Wayfinder selections before applying changes.
Notifications.DuplicateSelections: The same compendium choice cannot fill multiple Wayfinder slots in the same draft.
